name: Marco C.
text: The portfolio he built for me looks genuinely premium. Clean design, fast load, works great on mobile. He was easy to talk to and made revisions without any fuss.

name: Rx_Dev
text: Hired him for a Lua script and he nailed the anti-detection side of things. Solid work and he actually explained what he did and why. Rare to find that level of communication.
